title: Excalibur|BalancedCrates Support
body: Replace the GUI and textures of the BalancedCratesl mod with the style of Excalibur. You may choose either an empty or containing treasure. Credits: Thanks to Maffhew for the Excalibur resource pack, boasting impeccable artistry. Thanks to licitlettuce for crafting the vanilla-style storage mod; none better could be found. - licitlettuce – Creator of Balanced Crates - Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur - littlh - made textures of this pack I am creating compatible textures for medieval-style resource packs and mods, as well as custom textures for individual projects. You can also support me via Ko-fi.
